notes: Day 22 (Mar 21 = NOWRUZ DAY 2) UPDATE 12:00PM ET. Sources: CNN D21-D22, AJ liveblog D21-D22, CNBC, AP, Bloomberg, Fortune, OilPrice.com, OilPriceAPI, NPR, NBC, Wikipedia, Investing.com, IAEA, Euronews, NCRI, Iran International, Carnegie, Windward, PBS, WSJ, JPost, Fox News, Militarnyi, TWZ, CBS, Axios, The Hill, ITV, GBNews, The Aviationist, Air & Space Forces, Military Times, Daily Wire, Washington Times, ABC News, Good Returns, Trading Economics, Goldman Sachs, Time, Bahrain MoD, Saudi MoD, UK MoD, Swiss govt, NPR Day 22.

DIEGO GARCIA — FIRST ATTACK BEYOND MIDDLE EAST: Iran fired 2 intermediate-range ballistic missiles (IRBMs, likely Khorramshahr-4) at Diego Garcia US-UK base in Indian Ocean (~4,000 km). One failed in flight, US warship fired SM-3 at other. Neither hit base. SIGNIFICANCE: (1) First Iranian attack beyond Middle East. (2) Reveals Iran's actual missile range is DOUBLE the 2,000 km Araghchi publicly claimed. (3) European capitals now within theoretical IRBM range. (4) Bloomberg: 'show of missile capability.' (5) Directly contradicts Trump's '8% missile capacity' claim AND Netanyahu's 'ballistic capability destroyed.' Iran still has IRBMs.

NATANZ STRUCK AGAIN — NUCLEAR ESCALATION: US warplanes hit Natanz nuclear enrichment facility with bunker-busting bombs (KAN, citing sources). IAEA informed by Iran: 'no increase in off-site radiation levels.' IAEA Grossi: 'military restraint to avoid nuclear accident.' This is the SECOND major strike on Natanz (first was Mar 2-3). Combined with Isfahan underground = nuclear verification crisis deepening. IAEA estimates Iran has ~1,000 lbs (440kg) HEU = ~11 weapons.

IRGC SPOKESMAN NAINI KILLED — 7TH SENIOR KILL: BG Ali Mohammad Naini (68, IRGC spokesperson since 2024) killed in overnight strike HOURS after appearing on TV warning of 'surprises.' IRGC: 'criminal cowardly terrorist attack.' Also killed: Esmail Ahmadi (Basij intelligence chief), Mehdi Gharish (aerospace commander), Kavous Dehrood (special forces). = Multiple senior commanders eliminated on Nowruz eve/day. Naini had insisted Iran retained full missile manufacturing capacity.

TRUMP 'WINDING DOWN' — CONTRADICTED BY ACTIONS: Trump Truth Social: 'getting very close to meeting our objectives as we consider winding down.' Listed 5 objectives: degrade missiles, destroy defense industrial base, eliminate navy/air force, prevent nuclear capability, protect allies. BUT: (1) Thousands more US troops deploying. (2) Israeli DM Katz SAME DAY: attacks will 'increase significantly' next week. (3) Trump: 'no ceasefire,' 'you don't do a ceasefire when you're literally obliterating the other side.' (4) Senior Iranian source: doesn't believe Trump. (5) Pentagon: more warships + Marines heading to region.

UK BASES AUTHORIZED FOR HORMUZ: UK authorized US to use RAF Fairford (England) + Diego Garcia for 'specific and limited defensive operations' in Strait of Hormuz. UK MoD: 'Iran's reckless attacks, lashing out across the region and holding hostage the Strait of Hormuz, are a threat to British interests.' SIGNIFICANCE: First UK direct military support infrastructure for Hormuz operations. Iran responded with Diego Garcia IRBMs.

BAHRAIN CUMULATIVE: 143 missiles + 242 drones intercepted since D1 (BDF official). Saudi: 20+ drones in eastern region within hours, 5 more later. Kuwait Al-Ahmadi hit AGAIN. Iran fired 9 separate salvoes at Israel (Israeli authorities). UAE continued intercepts.

IRAN THREATENS TOURISM SITES WORLDWIDE: Washington Times: Iran threatened to expand retaliatory attacks to include 'recreational and tourist sites worldwide.' MAJOR ESCALATION in rhetoric. Combined with Diego Garcia IRBM = Iran signaling global reach.
SWITZERLAND ARMS BAN: Swiss government banned export of war materiel to US or other involved nations for duration of conflict. First neutral nation to formally restrict allied arms supply.

OIL D22: Brent ~$112 (OilPriceAPI $112.19; settled $112.19 = highest close of war). Fortune: trading range $105-$111. Goldman Sachs: higher prices could last through 2027. UP from D21 ~$110. Bessent 140M barrels sanctions lifted until April 19. UN IMO: negotiating humanitarian corridor for 20,000 stranded seafarers.

HOUTHI RESTRAINT — DAY 22: Still out. Under 'immense pressure' (AJ) but no military intervention declared. Abdel-Malik al-Houthi first address: 'fully prepared' but analysts interpreted as deflecting immediate burden.

CASUALTIES D22: Iran 1,400+ official (Red Crescent: 18,000+ injured, 204 children killed). Hengaw extrapolated ~5,800+. Lebanon: 1,001+ killed (MoPH), 2,584 wounded, 118 children. Israel: 15+. US: 13 KIA. Gulf: 21+. Iraq: 61+. Internet blackout 22nd day. NPR: 'fourth week, no clear end in sight.'

F-35 CONFIRMED (D20): CENTCOM confirmed F-35 made emergency landing after being struck by Iranian fire (likely infrared-guided air defense). First F-35 hit by enemy fire ever. Iran released video. Pilot stable. ~20 US aircraft damaged/destroyed in war.

Reveals missile range DOUBLE what Iran claimed. US struck Natanz nuclear facility with bunker-busters — IAEA: no radiation. IRGC spokesman Naini killed hours after warning of 'surprises.' Trump: 'winding down' — but Israeli DM says attacks will 'increase significantly.' UK authorized bases for Hormuz strikes. Oil UP ~$112 (highest close). Houthis STILL out Day 22. Iran threatens tourism sites worldwide. Switzerland bans arms exports. Fourth week, no end in sight.

sitrep: DIEGO GARCIA — FIRST ATTACK BEYOND MIDDLE EAST: Iran fired 2 IRBMs (likely Khorramshahr-4) at Diego Garcia US-UK base in Indian Ocean (~4,000 km). One failed in flight, US warship fired SM-3 at other. Neither hit base. SIGNIFICANCE: First Iranian attack beyond Middle East. Iran IRBM range ~4,000 km = DOUBLE claimed. European capitals in theoretical range. Contradicts Trump '8% capacity' + Netanyahu 'destroyed.' Bloomberg: 'show of missile capability.'

NATANZ STRUCK AGAIN: US warplanes hit Natanz nuclear enrichment facility with bunker-busters (KAN). IAEA: 'no increase in off-site radiation.' Grossi: 'military restraint to avoid nuclear accident.' Second major Natanz strike (first D3-4). IAEA: 440kg HEU = ~11 weapons. Isfahan underground 'never visited.' Nuclear verification crisis deepening.

IRGC COMMAND DECAPITATION: BG Naini (IRGC spokesman) killed hours after TV appearance warning of 'surprises.' Also: Basij intel chief Ahmadi, aerospace commander Gharish, special forces Dehrood. 7th-8th senior kills. Naini's final claim: Iran retains FULL missile manufacturing capacity — most important posthumous IRGC statement of war.

TRUMP 'WINDING DOWN' — CONTRADICTED: Trump Truth Social: 'winding down.' BUT: Israeli DM Katz: attacks 'increase significantly' next week = first public US-Israel divergence. Trump: 'no ceasefire.' More troops deploying. Senior Iranian source: doesn't believe Trump. NPR: 'fourth week, no clear end in sight.'

UK BASES + HORMUZ: UK authorized RAF Fairford + Diego Garcia for Hormuz strikes. Iran responded with Diego Garcia IRBMs. Bahrain joined EU/Japan/Canada for Hormuz support. Switzerland BANNED war materiel exports to US/involved nations.

HOUTHI RESTRAINT — DAY 22: Still NOT entered war. al-Houthi: 'fully prepared' but did not declare intervention. Analysts: deflecting burden. Stockpiles low. IF OUT: Red Sea open = partial containment.

OIL UP — BRENT ~$112: Highest close of war (OilPriceAPI $112.19). Goldman Sachs: through 2027. Bessent 140M barrels until April 19. Oil rising DESPITE supply intervention = market skeptical. UN IMO: humanitarian corridor for 20,000 seafarers.

IRAN THREATENS GLOBAL TARGETS: Washington Times: Iran threatened 'recreational and tourist sites worldwide.' Combined with Diego Garcia IRBM = signaling GLOBAL reach. IRGC warned Ras al-Khaimah if Gulf islands attacked.
LEBANON — 1,001+: MoPH confirmed 1,001+ killed, 118 children, 2,584 wounded. 1 in 5 Lebanese displaced. Southern Beirut suburbs warned. Fierce fighting south Lebanon.

HUMANITARIAN CRISIS: Iran Red Crescent: 18,000+ injured, 204 children. ~5,800+ killed extrapolated. Internet 22nd day. F-35 confirmed hit (first ever). ~20 US aircraft damaged/destroyed. 13 US KIA. US bypassed Congress for UAE + Kuwait weapons.
DIPLOMACY: Trump: 'no ceasefire.' Israeli DM: 'increase significantly.' US-Israel divergence emerging. Bessent oil intervention. Geneva failed. Iraq: US camp near Baghdad airport attacked.

dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY + NUCLEAR WAR: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE (PM). Bushehr NPP 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). 5th senior kill (Basij head + Khatib). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi 4 ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting + drone at gas facility.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL + NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Ras Laffan x2, South Pars, Bushehr NPP all hit in single day. Iran named specific Gulf targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr. Israel striking northern Iran. D19 missile count REVISED UP from 35→40 on 2nd Ras Laffan confirmation.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $107.38 close (CNBC), spiked $111+ after-hours. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation. Kataib Hezbollah pause offer = first crack in Iran proxy unity. IMO corridor = international shipping institutions mobilizing. Every constraint dissolving simultaneously.

dailyRows.primary: SAMREF HIT + ENERGY WAR CONTINUES: Kuwait TWO refineries ablaze (Mina al-Ahmadi + Mina Abdullah). QatarEnergy: 'several' LNG facilities. SAMREF refinery (Yanbu, Red Sea) hit by drone — IRGC named target EXECUTED. 6th salvo at Israel. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 25+ drones. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed. Gabbard contradicts Trump. IAEA: 440kg = ~10 weapons. Bandar Anzali heavy bombardment.
dailyRows.capability: D20 REVISED: 45 missiles + 80 drones. SAMREF = FIRST Red Sea coast target. IRGC executing named target list: Kuwait ✓ Qatar ✓ SAMREF ✓. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. 6 salvos at Israel since midnight = maintaining pressure. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets. Bandar Anzali warships destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent surged $119.11 intraday (CNBC), settled ~$114 close. Citi: $120+. SAMREF 'impact minimal' per Aramco but symbolic significance enormous — Red Sea coast reached. Gabbard contradicts Trump. Kent FBI probe. Saudi FM 'trust shattered.' Pezeshkian resignation crisis. Swedish execution. Pentagon $200B+.
dailyRows.assessment: SAMREF is the inflection within the inflection. IRGC's named targets are being systematically executed. Red Sea coast = drones can reach Saudi Arabia's western export infrastructure, not just Gulf-facing facilities. This means pipeline bypass routes (East-West Pipeline to Yanbu) are no longer safe. The energy war has NO geographic limit within Saudi Arabia. Combined with Kuwait refineries + Qatar LNG = comprehensive assault on Gulf energy architecture.

dailyRows.primary: NOWRUZ DAY 1 — BESSENT 140M BARRELS + NETANYAHU 'IRAN DESTROYED' + TEHRAN STRUCK: Israel hit Tehran on Nowruz. Iran attacked Gulf: Kuwait Al-Ahmadi refinery fire (KPC confirmed), Saudi 15 drones intercepted (Al-Jawf/Eastern), Bahrain 'successive waves' intercepted, UAE 7 missiles + 15 drones intercepted. BESSENT: US may unsanction 140M barrels Iranian oil at sea. NETANYAHU: 'Iran can no longer enrich or produce missiles' — IAEA contradicts. Mojtaba absent since Mar 8 — Pezeshkian NO CONTACT. 3 protesters executed Qom Mar 19. 11th MEU (2,200 Marines) deploying. Lebanon confirmed 1,000+.
dailyRows.capability: D21: 40+72. NETANYAHU claims Iran ballistic/enrichment capability destroyed — directly contradicted by ongoing launches AND IAEA assessment. Iran still launching daily: Kuwait refinery fire proves continued operational capacity. IRGC desertions real at unit level (90% police absence, salary crisis) but disputed by Western analysts at institutional level. 7,000+ US targets struck. Joint Chiefs: 'attacking deeper.' BUT: autonomous IRGC units continue executing target list (4/7 hit). Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn.
dailyRows.cost: Brent DROPPED ~$110 (from $119 intraday D20). BESSENT intervention: 140M barrels Iranian + 130M barrels Russian oil unsanctioned. G7 SPR 400M barrels. Saudi officials (WSJ): $180/b if disruptions last through April. 1,000 tankers stranded at Hormuz. Operation Maritime Shield G7 launched — but US Navy 'does not have naval availability.' Multiple EU states DECLINED military involvement. Israel 15 killed (up from 14) + 4 West Bank. 13 US KIA. 11th MEU deploying. Pentagon $200B+ supplemental. CNN: 2,200+ killed across Middle East. 3 executions before Nowruz. Iranian diaspora: cancelled festivities.
dailyRows.assessment: D21 — NOWRUZ INFLECTION + SUPPLY-SIDE WAR BEGINS: (1) BESSENT 140M BARRELS = most aggressive supply-side intervention of war. Using Iranian oil against Iran. Combined with Russian oil + SPR = massive supply injection. Oil dropped $110 from $119. (2) NETANYAHU 'CAPABILITY DESTROYED' = strategic messaging. IAEA contradicts on nuclear. Ongoing launches contradict on missiles. (3) MOJTABA: absent since Mar 8, Pezeshkian has NO CONTACT = governance vacuum confirmed. (4) HOUTHIS: still out Day 21 = Red Sea open = partial containment holding. (5) 3 EXECUTIONS before Nowruz = regime using maximum repression. (6) 11th MEU deploying = US reinforcing despite Trump 'no troops' claim. The war is shifting from purely military to ECONOMIC WARFARE: Bessent weaponizing oil supply, Netanyahu claiming victory to create political off-ramp, IRGC still fighting but fracturing. Two wars: military (continuing) and economic/narrative (intensifying).

dailyRows.primary: DIEGO GARCIA IRBMs + NATANZ + IRGC DECAPITATION: Iran fired 2 IRBMs at Diego Garcia US-UK base (~4,000 km away) — FIRST attack beyond Middle East. One failed, SM-3 fired at other, neither hit. Natanz nuclear site struck again by US bunker-busters (KAN). Israel fired 9 salvoes at Israel. Saudi 20+ drones in eastern region. Kuwait Al-Ahmadi hit AGAIN. Bahrain cumul: 143 missiles + 242 drones.
dailyRows.capability: D22: 35+65. IRGC SPOKESMAN NAINI KILLED hours after warning of 'surprises' on TV — also Basij intel chief Ahmadi, aerospace commander Gharish, special forces Dehrood. DIEGO GARCIA = Iran IRBM range ~4,000 km = DOUBLE the 2,000 km publicly claimed. European capitals now in theoretical range. Directly contradicts Trump '8% capacity' AND Netanyahu 'destroyed.' Naini (hours before death): Iran retains FULL missile manufacturing capacity. Iran's 7th-8th senior kills.
dailyRows.cost: Brent UP ~$112 (highest close of war). OilPriceAPI $112.19. Goldman Sachs: higher prices through 2027. Trump 'winding down' Truth Social — but Israeli DM Katz SAME DAY: attacks 'increase significantly' next week. Trump: 'no ceasefire, you don't do a ceasefire when you're literally obliterating the other side.' UK authorized RAF Fairford + Diego Garcia for Hormuz strikes. Switzerland BANNED arms exports to US/involved nations. Iran THREATENED tourism/recreation sites worldwide. F-35 hit confirmed (D20 — first F-35 ever hit). UN IMO: humanitarian corridor for 20,000 stranded seafarers. ~20 US aircraft damaged/destroyed total.
dailyRows.assessment: D22 — CONTRADICTIONS DEFINE THE WAR: (1) DIEGO GARCIA = Iran's capabilities NOT destroyed. IRBMs reaching Indian Ocean = global reach demonstrated. Contradicts every 'mission accomplished' narrative. (2) TRUMP 'WINDING DOWN' vs ISRAELI DM 'INCREASE SIGNIFICANTLY' = US-Israel objectives diverging publicly for first time. Trump wants political off-ramp; Israel wants military victory. (3) NATANZ STRUCK AGAIN + IAEA no radiation = nuclear facilities being degraded but not eliminated. (4) NAINI KILLED = command decapitation continuing but NAINI'S FINAL MESSAGE ('full manufacturing capacity') may be most important IRGC claim of the war. (5) UK BASES = Hormuz operation materializing. (6) SWITZERLAND = first neutral arms ban. (7) IRAN THREATENS TOURISM WORLDWIDE + DIEGO GARCIA = signaling GLOBAL reach. (8) OIL UP $112 despite Bessent intervention = supply-side war NOT winning yet. The war has entered its FOURTH WEEK with no clear end in sight (NPR). Two narratives colliding: Trump declaring victory vs reality of continued Iranian capability.

timeline.title: Week 3–4 (Mar 16–21)
timeline.body: DIEGO GARCIA + NATANZ + TRUMP 'WINDING DOWN' + US-ISRAEL DIVERGENCE: Iran fired 2 IRBMs at Diego Garcia (~4,000 km) = first attack beyond Middle East = missile range DOUBLE claimed. Natanz struck AGAIN with bunker-busters. IRGC spokesman Naini killed hours after warning of 'surprises.' Trump: 'winding down' — Israeli DM Katz: 'increase significantly' = first public US-Israel divergence. UK authorized bases for Hormuz. Switzerland banned arms exports. Oil UP $112 (highest close). Houthis out Day 22. Iran threatens tourism sites worldwide. F-35 confirmed hit. NPR: 'no clear end in sight.' Fourth week begins.

timeline.title: Week 4–5 (Mar 22–Apr 5)
timeline.body: KEY VARIABLES: (1) US-ISRAEL DIVERGENCE: Trump 'winding down' vs Katz 'increase' — who wins? If Trump prevails: declared victory + partial withdrawal. If Israel prevails: deeper strikes. (2) DIEGO GARCIA FALLOUT: Iran demonstrated 4,000 km IRBM range. European targets now theoretical. UK bases authorized = escalation. (3) IRGC remaining targets (Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn) — can decapitated command structure still execute? (4) POST-NOWRUZ protests vs depleted security forces. (5) Hormuz: UK bases + UN IMO corridor + Bahrain/EU/Japan coalition vs Iranian mines. (6) Oil: can Bessent cap at $110-115 or does Goldman $120+ scenario materialize?

timeline.title: Month 2 (Apr–May)
timeline.body: Three crises converge: (1) Energy — IRGC target execution vs improved Gulf defenses (Ukrainian experts) + Macron moratorium; (2) Nuclear — Isfahan underground + IAEA locked out = breakout window; (3) Internal — post-Nowruz protest wave + succession crisis + IRGC two-front strain. US missile supply becomes binding constraint. Hormuz permission-based framework either formalizes (China/India corridor) or collapses.

timeline.title: Month 3+ (May onward)
timeline.body: If IRGC completes target list: permanent regional restructuring. Saudi entry = wider war. If post-Nowruz internal pressure sustains: IRGC faces existential two-front challenge. Nuclear verification crisis defines decade. Oman neutrality violated = regional alignment shifts. No clean outcome available.

timeline.title: Endgame variables
timeline.body: IRGC remaining targets (Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Post-Nowruz protest trajectory. Saudi military entry decision. Mojtaba's condition / succession. Ukrainian anti-drone impact. Selective Hormuz evolution. Macron energy moratorium. Trump South Pars trigger. US missile resupply. Isfahan nuclear. Congress $200B+. Lebanon Litani. Oman neutrality.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Escalation spiral / total war
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED 34%→33%. DIEGO GARCIA IRBMs = escalatory (4,000 km range, European targets possible) BUT also = desperation move. NATANZ struck again = nuclear escalation continues. IRGC spokesman killed = decapitation accelerating. HOWEVER: Trump 'winding down' rhetoric + Israeli DM 'increase significantly' = US-Israel DIVERGENCE may actually PREVENT total war because US applies brake while Israel accelerates alone. UK bases authorized but Switzerland banned arms = allied fragmentation. Oil $112 despite Bessent = economic pressure mounting on all sides. Still high because Diego Garcia demonstrates Iran's reach is global and IRGC autonomous units may execute remaining targets.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Protracted attrition + internal crisis
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED 26%→27%. STRONGEST EVIDENCE YET: (1) Trump 'winding down' vs Katz 'increase' = US-Israel divergence = no unified strategy = war continues without resolution. (2) Diego Garcia IRBM = Iran still has deep capability. Naini's final words: 'full manufacturing.' (3) F-35 confirmed hit = US aircraft vulnerability. ~20 damaged/destroyed. (4) Oil $112 DESPITE Bessent = supply-side intervention not capping effectively. Goldman Sachs: through 2027. (5) Natanz struck again but nuclear program not eliminated. (6) NPR: 'fourth week, no clear end in sight.' (7) Switzerland arms ban = allied fragmentation beginning. Mutual degradation continues with no exit mechanism.

scenarioProbabilities.name: International intervention / ceasefire
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED 17%→16%. Trump 'no ceasefire, you don't do a ceasefire when you're literally obliterating the other side.' This DIRECTLY reduces ceasefire probability. Swiss arms ban + Bahrain/EU/Japan Hormuz coalition = international engagement increasing but not toward ceasefire — toward Hormuz reopening specifically. UN IMO humanitarian corridor for 20,000 seafarers = institutional mobilization but narrow scope. Diego Garcia attack may galvanize UK/US military cooperation BUT not toward negotiation. Lebanon 1,001+ killed = ceasefire pressure but Israel warned more Beirut evacuations.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Declared victory + exit
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED 12%→13%. STILL GAINING. Trump 'winding down' = most explicit off-ramp language yet. Listed 5 objectives as near-complete. Trump claims Iran at '8% missile capacity.' BUT: Diego Garcia IRBM directly contradicts '8%' and makes 'mission accomplished' harder to sell credibly. Israeli DM 'increase significantly' = Israel NOT ready to exit even if Trump is. Key tension: Trump WANTS declared victory but REALITY keeps contradicting the narrative (Diego Garcia, Natanz, ongoing launches, oil $112). Most likely if: US-Israel divergence deepens and Trump unilaterally declares and withdraws US forces while Israel continues.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Regime fracture / IRGC collapse
scenarioProbabilities.body: UNCHANGED at 9%. IRGC command being systematically destroyed (Naini, Ahmadi, Gharish, Dehrood = 4 more senior kills D22 alone). 7-8 senior kills total. BUT: IRGC still launching missiles daily, Diego Garcia IRBM = deep capability remains, Naini's final statement 'full manufacturing' = institutional will intact even as individuals eliminated. Mojtaba absent Day 13 = governance vacuum deepening but IRGC operating autonomously without Supreme Leader guidance = paradoxically more dangerous, not weaker. Post-Nowruz protests key but police 90% absent = enforcement degraded.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.body: UNCHANGED. Trump: 'no ceasefire.' Geneva failed. Diego Garcia = Iran demonstrating it can reach far beyond Middle East = no negotiating incentive while retaining capability. Selective Hormuz passage evolving (UN IMO humanitarian corridor). Comprehensive deal: near-zero. Partial Hormuz framework most likely eventual outcome but not negotiated — imposed.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مارپیچ تشدید / جنگ تمام‌عیار
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش ۳۴→۳۳. دیگو گارسیا = تشدید اما ناامیدانه. واگرایی آمریکا-اسرائیل = ترمز. سوئیس ممنوع. اما برد جهانی ایران + واحدهای مستقل.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: فرسایشی + بحران داخلی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش ۲۶→۲۷. قوی‌ترین شواهد: واگرایی آمریکا-اسرائیل = بدون استراتژی واحد. دیگو گارسیا = توان عمیق. نفت $۱۱۲ علی‌رغم بسنت. گلدمن: تا ۲۰۲۷. NPR: 'پایان نامشخص.' سوئیس = شکاف متحد.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مداخله بین‌المللی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش ۱۷→۱۶. ترامپ: 'آتش‌بس نه.' سوئیس + بحرین/اتحادیه/ژاپن اما نه آتش‌بس — هرمز. سازمان دریایی کریدور. حوثی بیرون.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: اعلام پیروزی + خروج
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش ۱۲→۱۳. ترامپ 'کاهش' = صریح‌ترین. اما دیگو گارسیا = '۸٪' مخالف. کاتز 'افزایش' = اسرائیل آماده نیست. واگرایی: ترامپ خروج یکجانبه؟

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: شکست رژیم / فروپاشی سپاه
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: ثابت ۹. ۴ مقام بالا فقط D22 (نائینی + احمدی + غریش + دهرود). اما سپاه شلیک ادامه + دیگو گارسیا = توان نهادی. مجتبی غایب ۱۳ روز.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مذاکره
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: ثابت. ترامپ: 'آتش‌بس نه.' دیگو گارسیا = ایران توان دارد = انگیزه مذاکره نه.

theoryEvaluation.title: DIEGO GARCIA — Iran's global reach demonstrated
theoryEvaluation.body: NEW FRAMEWORK: Iran's 2 IRBMs at Diego Garcia (~4,000 km) = most strategically significant single action of Week 4. ANALYSIS: (1) RANGE REVELATION: Araghchi publicly claimed 2,000 km max. Actual capability is DOUBLE. Bloomberg: 'show of missile capability.' European capitals (London ~5,500 km, Paris ~5,200 km, Berlin ~4,900 km) now within theoretical reach of extended-range variants. (2) CONTRADICTS ALL NARRATIVES: Trump's '8% capacity,' Netanyahu's 'destroyed,' White House 'functionally destroyed' — all undermined by a single IRBM launch at an Indian Ocean base. (3) IRGC SPOKESMAN'S FINAL MESSAGE: Naini said hours before death that Iran retains 'full missile manufacturing capacity.' Diego Garcia proves this wasn't bluster. (4) ESCALATION DYNAMICS: UK authorized bases BEFORE Diego Garcia attack. Iran responded WITH Diego Garcia attack. Tit-for-tat escalation beyond Middle East = new phase. (5) DETERRENCE: Iran signaling that even distant bases are not safe. This could paradoxically ACCELERATE Trump's 'winding down' desire OR trigger deeper escalation. (6) F-35 HIT: Combined with confirmed F-35 damage = US technology not invulnerable to Iranian capabilities.

theoryEvaluation.title: US-ISRAEL DIVERGENCE — the defining D22 dynamic
theoryEvaluation.body: CRITICAL NEW DEVELOPMENT: On the SAME DAY, Trump said 'winding down' and Israeli DM Katz said attacks will 'increase significantly.' This is the FIRST PUBLIC US-ISRAEL DIVERGENCE of the war. ANALYSIS: (1) Trump's 5 objectives are framed as near-complete. He wants OUT. $200B+ cost, 13 KIA, domestic gas prices. (2) Israel wants MAXIMUM degradation of Iran. Katz directly contradicted Trump within hours. (3) Trump said 'no ceasefire' — he wants unilateral declaration of victory, not negotiation. (4) Israel wants continued military operations regardless of US political timeline. (5) IMPLICATIONS: If divergence deepens, US may withdraw while Israel continues = Israel loses US air tanking, ISR, munitions resupply. OR: Trump caves to Israel and drops 'winding down.' OR: Compromise — US reduces tempo while Israel maintains. This divergence is the single most important POLITICAL dynamic of the war going forward.

theoryEvaluation.title: HOUTHI RESTRAINT — reinforced but fragile (Day 22)
theoryEvaluation.body: 22 days in, Houthis still NOT attacked. AJ: 'under immense pressure.' al-Houthi's first address: 'fully prepared' but analysts interpreted as deflecting. He did NOT declare military intervention. Analysis: (1) Stockpiles low (AP). (2) Israeli 2025 strikes = deterrence. (3) Possible US/Saudi deal. (4) Diego Garcia may REINFORCE Houthi caution — if Iran is reaching Indian Ocean, Houthis may calculate their own entry is less needed. (5) BUT: Iran threatening 'tourism sites worldwide' + Naini's 'full manufacturing' = Iran may eventually coordinate Houthi entry as ultimate escalation card. UNCHANGED ASSESSMENT: Houthi restraint = Red Sea open = war manageable. Houthi entry = unprecedented. Day 22 = restraint holding but each day of continued war increases probability of eventual entry.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: دیگو گارسیا — برد جهانی ایران
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ۲ IRBM (~۴,۰۰۰ کیلومتر) = برد واقعی ۲ برابر ادعا. پایتخت‌های اروپا در برد تئوریک. ترامپ '۸٪' + نتانیاهو 'نابود' = هر دو مخالف. نائینی (قبل مرگ): 'تولید کامل.' F-35 اصابت = آسیب‌پذیری آمریکا.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: واگرایی آمریکا-اسرائیل — تعیین‌کننده
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ترامپ: 'کاهش.' کاتز: 'افزایش.' اولین واگرایی علنی. ترامپ خواهان خروج ($۲۰۰ میلیارد + ۱۳ کشته). اسرائیل خواهان حداکثر تخریب. اگر عمیق‌تر: آمریکا خروج یکجانبه؟

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: حوثی بیرون — تقویت اما شکننده (روز ۲۲)
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ۲۲ روز. 'آمادگی' اما مداخله اعلام نکرد. دیگو گارسیا = ورود حوثی کمتر لازم. اما تهدید جهانگردی + 'تولید کامل' = ممکن بعداً. دریای سرخ باز = مهار.

endstate.title: Most likely (33%)
endstate.body: Escalation spiral — DECREASED 34%→33%. Diego Garcia = escalatory but also desperate. US-Israel divergence may prevent total war (US braking). BUT: Iran demonstrated 4,000 km range, IRGC spokesman said 'full manufacturing,' Israeli DM wants 'increase.' Wild cards: autonomous IRGC units + Isfahan underground + Iran global threats.

endstate.body: Protracted attrition — INCREASED 26%→27%. STRONGEST EVIDENCE: US-Israel divergence = no unified strategy. Diego Garcia = Iran capability persists. Most likely if US-Israel divergence deepens and Trump unilaterally withdraws while Israel continues alone.

endstate_fa.body: تشدید — کاهش ۳۴→۳۳. دیگو گارسیا = تشدید + ناامید. واگرایی آمریکا-اسرائیل = ترمز. اما برد ۴,۰۰۰ + 'تولید کامل' + کاتز 'افزایش.'

endstate_fa.body: فرسایشی — افزایش ۲۶→۲۷. قوی‌ترین شواهد. واگرایی = بدون استراتژی. نفت $۱۱۲. گلدمن: ۲۰۲۷. NPR: 'پایان نامشخص.' سوئیس ممنوع.

endstate_fa.title: نوظهور (۱۶٪)
endstate_fa.body: مداخله — کاهش ۱۷→۱۶. ترامپ: 'آتش‌بس نه.' هرمز ائتلاف اما محدود.

endstate_fa.title: در حال رشد (۱۳٪)
endstate_fa.body: اعلام پیروزی — افزایش ۱۲→۱۳. ترامپ 'کاهش.' اما دیگو گارسیا = '۸٪' مخالف. کاتز: اسرائیل آماده نیست.
